text: I drive over 30 mins from Salt Lake to come here because Kylee is so great! Pricing is reasonable and there are different options for pain relief during removal sessions. When people tell you tattoo removal hurts, they are not lying!!! I don’t think I could I go through this process if it weren't for the team there. They are so kind and always do whatever they can to make me comfortable. Highly recommend!
author: Noelle

text: Great experience. Makes the process super easy. Have been seeing results quick and everyone is super welcoming and nice! I recommend going here!!
author: SAMI BONNIWELL

text: April has been great with my tattoo removal process. Super happy so far!
author: Hailee

text: Aunika is absolutely amazing! From my initial tattoo removal consultation to each treatment session, she explained everything clearly and made sure I was comfortable throughout the entire process. She’s incredibly kind and professional, and I’m so glad I chose to come here. I highly recommend Aunika to anyone considering tattoo removal—you’ll be in the best hands!!
author: Amanda Hall

text: Aunika was so professional and did such a great job on my eyebrow tattoo removal. The process was so quick and with the numbing cream, barely painful at all. I would definitely recommend doing this at Aesthetica Plastic Surgery. If you have any regrets about getting your eyebrows micro bladed as I did, I recommend this 100%. A great experience!
author: Denise

text: April was incredible. Super transparent, friendly and personable. Made the decision to work with them a no brainer, can’t recommend enough!
author: Carlin Smart

text: O have had such a great experience with Inklifters! April has been amazing from day one — she is professional, caring, and always follows up to make sure the healing process is going well. The tattoo removal treatments have been effective, and I feel comfortable and informed every step of the way. I highly recommend asking for April; she truly goes above and beyond to provide excellent service. 🩶🖤
author: diana valle

text:
I decided to remove my microblading and went to Aesthetica it was the 🤓best decision
Aunika was amazing; she explained every step with so much care and made sure I felt comfortable and confident. She’s incredibly sweet and kind, and her work was excellent. Everything turned out just how I hoped.
Highly recommend her, 11/10🥰 yes!

Decidí remover mi microblading y fui a Aesthetica  ¡fue la mejor decisión🤓
Aunika fue maravillosa; me explicó cada paso con mucho cuidado y se aseguró de que me sintiera cómoda y segura. Es muy dulce y amable, y su trabajo fue excelente. Todo salió tal como lo esperaba.
La recomiendo muchísimo, 11/10! 🥰 yes!
author: Jaz Aquino
